name: Basurs Zalda (Garlic Soup) or Moscor Zalda (Drunkard's So
recipeIngredient: Dry French bread, broken into small chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the bottom of a cast iron frying pan with oil.
2. Add the garlic and brown gently.
3. Add the bread and stir to coat with oil.
4. Add water to cover the ingredients.
5. Add parsley.
6. Simmer for 15-20 minutes.
7. After simmering, add the eggs. The eggs can be stirred in or poached.
This soup is good for sinusitis, colds, and hangovers. Please stand downwind from others.
